chunks.text: EECS Undergraduate Newsletter | November 1, 2024 - EECS at Berkeley. This newsletter provides updates and information for undergraduate students in the Electrical Engineering and Computer Sciences department at UC Berkeley. It covers recent events, announcements, and opportunities relevant to the EECS community.

The newsletter includes details on upcoming academic deadlines, such as course registration periods and project submission dates. It also highlights student achievements, including awards and research presentations, to recognize and inspire the EECS student body.

Information on faculty positions is featured, encouraging students to explore teaching and research opportunities. The newsletter may list open roles and application processes for those interested in academic careers within EECS.

Events such as workshops, seminars, and networking sessions are announced to help students engage with the department and industry professionals. These events aim to support career development and technical skills enhancement.
